info.title: Magic CMS Public API
info.description: Public API generated from internal merged spec using operations tagged 'public'.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of products. Supports text search and filters for workflow status, stock state, attributes, category, and product type.

200.description: Paginated product list matching the supplied filters.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free-text search across indexed product fields (for example name and SKU).

parameters.name: attribute_filters
parameters.description: JSON object (stringified) where keys are attribute names and values are expected attribute values.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort token used by the products service (for example `name_asc`).

parameters.name: product_type
parameters.description: Filter by the scalar product type stored on product documents.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by the scalar category stored on product documents.

post.description: Creates a new product with pricing, inventory, classification, media, and optional monetization metadata.

201.description: Product created successfully. Returns the created product identifier.

requestBody.description: Product payload used to create a new product record.

post.description: Creates a new product by cloning an existing product and re-generating system-managed identifiers.

201.description: Product duplicate created successfully. Returns the new product identifier.

requestBody.description: Identifier of the source product that should be duplicated.

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: Either the product's ObjectId (`_id`) or its external integer `id` as a string.

get.description: Fetches a single product by identifier.

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: Either the product's ObjectId (_id) or its integer external id.

put.description: Updates one product. Only provided fields are updated.

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: Either the product's ObjectId (`_id`) or its external integer `id` as a string.

requestBody.description: Partial product payload containing fields to update.

Catalog.description: Catalog entity containing rule-based and manual product selection configuration.

rule_ids.description: Catalog rule identifiers evaluated to resolve dynamic product membership.

manual_includes.description: Product identifiers always included in this catalog.

manual_excludes.description: Product identifiers always excluded from this catalog.

plan_variant_excludes.description: Plan/variant combinations excluded from this catalog for entitlement-specific behavior.

schedule_start.description: Optional ISO datetime when scheduled catalog activation starts.

schedule_end.description: Optional ISO datetime when scheduled catalog activation ends.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the catalog.

market_ids.description: Market identifiers associated with this catalog.

CatalogCreateRequest.description: Payload used to create a catalog.

rule_ids.description: Catalog rule identifiers to attach at creation time.

schedule_start.description: Optional ISO datetime when scheduled activation starts.

schedule_end.description: Optional ISO datetime when scheduled activation ends.

status.description: Initial lifecycle status for the catalog.

items.description: Catalog records for the current page.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata for the current query.

CatalogManualProductsRequest.description: Manual membership override payload for catalog products.

manual_includes.description: Product identifiers to force-include in the catalog.

manual_excludes.description: Product identifiers to force-exclude from the catalog.

CatalogProduct.description: Resolved catalog product with membership provenance.

membership_source.description: How this product entered the catalog (`rule` or `manual_include`).

CatalogProductStats.description: Aggregate counters for resolved catalog product membership.

total_products.description: Total resolved products in this catalog.

total_variants.description: Total resolved product variants across all matched products.

CatalogProductsListResponse.description: Paginated response for resolved catalog products.

items.description: Resolved products for the current page.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata for the current query.

stats.description: Aggregate counts for resolved catalog membership.

is_stale.description: True when the denormalized membership-sync cache has not yet caught up with the latest rule/catalog edits.

CatalogRuleCondition.description: Condition operator/value pair supported by a catalog rule field.

op.description: Comparison operator supported by the field.

value.description: Serialized operator token consumed by rule evaluation.

CatalogRuleField.description: Rule-builder field definition and allowed condition operators.

key.description: Field key used in rule clauses.

name.description: Field label shown in the rule builder.

conditions.description: Condition operators available for this field.

CatalogRuleFieldOptionsResponse.description: Dynamic option values used by catalog rule fields.

taxonomy_values.description: Available taxonomy values grouped by taxonomy name.

CatalogRulesListResponse.description: List response for catalog rule field metadata.

CatalogUpdateRequest.description: Payload used to update an existing catalog. All fields are optional.

schedule_start.description: Optional ISO datetime when scheduled activation starts.

schedule_end.description: Optional ISO datetime when scheduled activation ends.

CatalogUsageResponse.description: Summary of where a catalog is referenced.

markets.description: Markets currently linked to this catalog.

schedules.description: Schedule entries that reference this catalog.

Collection.description: Collection entity used to group products manually or via rules.

rules.description: Rule condition tree used when the collection type is `smart`.

product_count.description: Resolved number of products currently in the collection.

manual_product_ids.description: Product identifiers manually included when using manual mode.

CollectionCreateRequest.description: Payload used to create a collection.

rules.description: Rule condition tree for smart collections.

manual_product_ids.description: Product identifiers manually included in this collection.

items.description: Collection records for the current page.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata for the current query.

CollectionProductsPreviewRequest.description: Payload used to preview products for a collection definition.

catalog_id.description: Catalog identifier used to scope preview evaluation.

rules.description: Rule condition tree used for smart collection preview.

manual_product_ids.description: Manual product IDs considered for preview.

search.description: Optional free-text search across previewed products.

CollectionProductsPreviewResponse.description: Preview response for collection product membership.

items.description: Previewed products for the current page.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata for the preview query.

stats.description: Aggregate counts for the preview result set.

is_stale.description: True when membership-sync cache is behind and preview includes stale indicators.

CollectionType.description: Collection mode. `manual` uses explicit product IDs, `smart` uses rule conditions.

CollectionUpdateRequest.description: Payload used to update an existing collection. All fields are optional.

rules.description: Rule condition tree for smart collections.

manual_product_ids.description: Product identifiers manually included in this collection.

Country.description: Country object returned by country APIs. Includes dynamic fields persisted for the tenant.

CurrencyPair.description: Currency pair descriptor used in sync and missing-pair reporting.

CurrencyRatePair.description: Single currency conversion pair and resolved rate.

CurrencyRateUpsertRequest.description: Payload used to create or update one saved currency conversion pair.

CurrencyRatesResponse.description: Live currency-rate response for tenant currency pairs.

base.description: Base currency used for upstream live-rate normalization.

fetched_at.description: Timestamp when live rates were fetched from upstream provider.

missing.description: Currencies or pairs that could not be resolved.

stale.description: True when rates are returned from stale cache due to upstream issues.

Market.description: Market object returned by market APIs. Includes dynamic tenant-specific fields.

id.description: String form of the market identifier.

MarketComplianceRequirement.description: Compliance requirement tracked for a market.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the requirement.

MarketComplianceRequirementCreate.description: Payload used to create a market compliance requirement.

MarketComplianceRequirementUpdate.description: Payload used to update an existing market compliance requirement.

MarketComplianceRequirementsListResponse.description: List response for market compliance requirements.

MarketCreate.description: Payload used to create a market.

country_code.description: ISO country code for the market.
country_code.title: Country Code

currency.description: ISO currency code used for pricing in this market.
currency.title: Currency

active_catalog_id.description: Catalog identifier currently active for this market.
active_catalog_id.title: Active Catalog Id

MarketSale.description: Sale campaign configured for a market.

catalog_id.description: Catalog identifier used as the sale scope.
catalog_id.title: Catalog Id

name.description: Display name of the sale campaign.
name.title: Name

MarketSale.title: MarketSale

MarketSalesListResponse.description: List response for market sale campaigns.

items.description: Sale campaigns configured for the market.
items.title: Items

MarketSalesListResponse.title: MarketSalesListResponse

MarketSetDefault.description: Optional command payload for setting the default market.

MarketUpdate.description: Payload used to update a market. All fields are optional.

country_code.title: Country Code

MetafieldDefinition.description: Metafield definition object returned by definition APIs. Includes dynamic fields persisted for the tenant.

MetafieldDefinitionCreate.description: Payload used to create a metafield definition.

namespace.description: Namespace used to group related definitions.
namespace.title: Namespace

name.description: Display name shown in admin surfaces.
name.title: Name

owner_type.description: Owner resource type this definition applies to.
owner_type.title: Owner Type

type.description: Value type expected for metafield values.
type.title: Type

description.description: Optional helper text describing intended usage.
description.title: Description

validations.description: Optional validation rules interpreted by backend/UI.
validations.title: Validations

pinned.description: Pins definition for quicker access in admin forms.
pinned.title: Pinned

sort_by.description: Sort token for definition list ordering.

items.description: Metafield definition records for the current page.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata for the current query.

MetafieldDefinitionUpdate.description: Payload used to update an existing metafield definition. All fields are optional.

MetafieldListQuery.description: Query payload equivalent for listing metafields for a specific owner.

owner_type.description: Owner resource type whose metafields are requested.
owner_type.title: Owner Type

MetafieldListQuery.title: MetafieldListQuery

MetafieldListResponse.description: Combined response containing metafield definitions and owner values.

definitions.description: Definitions relevant to the requested owner type.

values.description: Stored metafield values for the requested owner.

MetafieldUpsert.description: Payload used to create or update a metafield value for an owner.

definition_id.description: Metafield definition identifier that governs value type/validation.
definition_id.title: Definition Id

owner_id.description: Identifier of the owner resource receiving this metafield value.
owner_id.title: Owner Id

value.description: Serialized metafield value stored against the owner.
value.title: Value

MetafieldUpsert.title: MetafieldUpsert

MetafieldUpsertResponse.description: Outcome of a metafield upsert operation.

matched.description: True when an existing value matched and was updated; false when inserted.

upserted_id.description: Identifier of the inserted value when no match existed.

MetafieldValue.description: Metafield value object returned by metafield APIs. Includes dynamic fields persisted for the tenant.

Product.description: Product object returned by product APIs, including identity, merchandising, inventory, media, pricing, and membership metadata.

id.description: Internal CMS product identifier (string form of Mongo `_id`).

external_product_id.description: External/store product identifier mirrored from the source system when present.

name.description: Display name shown in product listings and detail views.

description_html.description: Rich HTML description content for storefront rendering.

description.description: Plain text or editor-safe description value.

short_description_html.description: Short rich HTML summary used in cards and previews.

short_description.description: Short plain text summary of the product.

sku.description: Top-level SKU used as the primary product identifier in operations.

model_number.description: Optional manufacturer or internal model number.

barcode.description: Optional scannable barcode value for fulfillment/inventory systems.

status.description: Lifecycle status used for draft/publish/archive workflows.

currency.description: Display currency code resolved for the product context.

currency_symbol.description: Currency symbol used for formatted price display.

price.description: Primary selling price (kept in sync from first variation when variations exist).

regular_price.description: Compare-at/list price used for discount and strike-through display.

cost_per_item.description: Internal unit cost used for margin analytics.

tax_class.description: Tax class value used by downstream tax handling.

on_sale.description: Derived flag indicating `price` is lower than `regular_price`.

categories.description: Structured taxonomy category entries assigned to the product.

tags.description: Free-form tags used for grouping and filtering.

vendor.description: Supplier or brand value associated with this product.

product_type.description: Classifier title stored directly on the product for filtering and rules.

category.description: Selected category label (from taxonomy source) stored on the product.

attributes.description: Product attribute definitions and selected options.

taxonomies.description: Additional taxonomy-like attribute groups attached to the product.

images.description: Flattened image URLs derived from `media` for compatibility consumers.

main_image.description: Primary image URL; defaults to the first image URL when available.

variations.description: Variation rows containing SKU/price/stock and variation-specific metadata.

stock_quantity.description: Available stock count for simple products or summary contexts.

stock_status.description: Inventory state used for storefront and admin stock indicators.

low_stock_threshold.description: Threshold under which product stock is considered low.

allow_backorders.description: Allows order placement when inventory is depleted.

total_sales.description: Lifetime sold quantity tracked for analytics and reporting.

weight.description: Default product shipping weight when using single shipping mode.

dimensions.description: Default product dimensions for shipping calculations.

packaging.description: Packaging metadata associated with the product shipping profile.

seo.description: SEO metadata attached to the product.

exclude_from_sitemap.description: When true, excludes product URL from generated sitemaps.

monetization_config.description: Monetization plan-type configuration keyed by market.

plan_code.description: Attached billing/plan code when monetization is configured.

notes.description: Internal notes maintained by merchandising or operations teams.

scheduled_at.description: Scheduled publish datetime in ISO format when applicable.

catalog_ids.description: Catalog membership IDs denormalized on the product.

membership_synced_at.description: ISO timestamp of the last successful membership sync run for this product.

average_rating.description: Average review score aggregated from product reviews.

review_count.description: Total number of reviews counted for this product.

website_id.description: Tenant website identifier owning this product.

created_by.description: User identifier of the creator in this CMS tenant.

updated_at.description: Last update timestamp in ISO-8601 format.

sku.description: Top-level SKU; can be auto-derived from variations for variable products.
sku.title: Sku

regular_price.description: Original/list price used for comparison and strike-through pricing.
regular_price.title: Regular Price

category.description: Selected category label stored directly on the product.
category.title: Category

product_type.description: Selected product type stored directly on the product.
product_type.title: Product Type

Rule.description: Catalog rule entity stored for dynamic catalog membership evaluation.

conditions.description: Condition tree evaluated for this rule.

priority.description: Evaluation priority (higher/lower ordering handled by backend semantics).

catalog_id.description: Catalog identifier this rule belongs to.

RuleClause.description: Single clause inside a rule condition tree.

field.description: Product field key evaluated by this clause.

value.description: Expected value to compare against the selected field.

RuleConditions.description: Boolean condition tree evaluated to determine rule matches.

operator.description: Top-level boolean operator that joins all clauses.

clauses.description: Collection of comparison clauses under the selected operator.

RuleCreateRequest.description: Payload used to create a catalog rule.

conditions.description: Condition tree evaluated for this rule.

catalog_id.description: Catalog identifier this rule belongs to.

RuleUpdateRequest.description: Payload used to update an existing catalog rule. All fields are optional.

conditions.description: Condition tree evaluated for this rule.

catalog_id.description: Catalog identifier this rule belongs to.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp for this saved pair.

updated_at.description: Last update timestamp for this saved pair.

SavedCurrencyRatesResponse.description: List response for tenant-saved currency rates.

SyncMarketsRequest.description: Optional payload controlling market FX sync behavior.

base_currency.description: Optional base currency override used during sync.

SyncMarketsResponse.description: Summary response for syncing saved currency rates into markets.

base_currency.description: Base currency used for this sync run.

missing_pairs.description: Currency pairs required by markets but missing from saved rates.

name.description: Display name of the taxonomy group.

values.description: Optional initial list of taxonomy values.
values.title: Values

sort_by.title: Sort By

TaxonomyListQuery.title: TaxonomyListQuery

items.description: Taxonomy records for the current page.
